data.text: THE FIRST OF FOUR FELYSIAN WORLDS IN THIS STAR SYSTEM.
TOMPALOON IS A MOON OF THE THIRD PLANET, BREYUS.
IT APPEARS GREEN FROM ORBIT, WITH MORE LAND THAN WATER, AND THE LAND
MASSES ARE INTERCONNECTED INTO MORE OR LESS ONE SOLID MASS.
310.74:THE LANDING SITE IS NEAR A TALL AND STEEP MOUNTAIN. THERE
ARE SMALL LAKES TO THE NORTHWEST AND THERE ARE TREES WITH BLUE
13.47 IS IN THE MIDDLE OF A LARGE FOREST.
OVERALL, THIS PLANET IS MUCH LIKE FELYSIA, WITH THE GRAVITY AND
AIR PRESSURE BOTH ALMOST EQUAL TO 1, ALONG WITH A VERY WARM CLIMATE
I WILL RETURN TO THIS PLANET LATER TO CONTINUE EXPLORING.
